text: Best seafood in Jacksonville — the grilled snapper was perfectly seasoned. Service was warm and efficient.
Absolute gem. The pasta is house-made and the wine list is thoughtful. Will be back soon.
Great neighborhood pub. Bartender knew every craft beer on tap. Fries were crispy and the burgers hit the spot.
Wonderful ambiance for a date night. The chef came out to check on us. Highly recommend the tasting menu.
Perfect brunch spot. The eggs benedict was excellent and the mimosas kept flowing. Great outdoor seating.
Coffee shop with amazing pastries. The croissants are legit — flaky, buttery, everything.
Family-friendly diner. The pancakes are the size of your head. Kids loved it.
Great pizza. Wood-fired and authentic. The salumi board was a standout.
Excellent Japanese food. The sushi was fresh and the sashimi platter was beautifully presented.
Cozy Italian trattoria. The osso buco was fall-off-the-bone tender. Nice wine selection.
Solid Mexican food. Tacos were flavorful and the margaritas strong. Salsa bar is a nice touch.
Best Vietnamese pho in town. Broth is rich and the beef is tender. Great value for the portion size.
Excellent Thai. The pad thai was authentic and the curry had the right heat level.
Mediterranean gem. The lamb kabobs and hummus platter were fantastic.
Wonderful French bistro. The escargot and duck confit were impeccable.
Great deli. Sandwiches are made with care and the sourdough bread is next level.
Perfect salad spot. Fresh ingredients and creative combinations. Great for a quick lunch.
Vegan spot with real flavor. The cashew mac and cheese was a revelation.
Great coffee. The pour-over was expertly made and the atmosphere is quiet enough to work.
Solid bar. Good beer selection, comfortable seating, and the wings are addictive.
Craft brewery with great outdoor seating. The hazy IPA was excellent.
Charming wine bar. Extensive selection and knowledgeable staff. Great small plates.
Fun cocktail bar with creative drinks. The bartender's off-menu recommendations are spot on.
Best sports bar for game day. Multiple screens, good pub food, and cold beer.
Classic dive bar with character. Cheap drinks and friendly regulars. Jukebox is amazing.
Great pub for a Sunday afternoon. The Sunday roast is worth the trip.
Amazing performing arts venue. Saw a great symphony performance last month.
Wonderful museum. The current exhibit is thought-provoking and well-curated.
Cozy independent bookstore. Great selection and the staff is genuinely helpful.
Solid sporting goods store. Good selection and helpful staff for gear recommendations.
Great home & garden store. Wide selection of plants and helpful advice.
Reliable hardware store. Staff knows their stuff and prices are reasonable.
Great furniture store. Quality pieces and helpful design consultation.
Best grocery in the area. Fresh produce, great meat counter, and reasonable prices.
Health food store with an excellent selection of organic and specialty items.
Farmers market every Saturday. Great local produce and artisan foods.
Convenient corner store. Good selection and always open when you need it.
BBQ joint with legit smoked brisket. The mac and cheese is the perfect side.
Best burger in town. Perfectly cooked patty and toasted brioche bun.
Cozy diner with great breakfast. Pancakes and eggs done right.
Comfort food at its finest. The chicken and waffles was outstanding.
Gastropub with elevated bar food. The lamb burger was exceptional.
Tapas bar with authentic Spanish flavors. Small plates that are big on flavor.
Perfect wine and cheese pairing. Great selection of both.
Fun fondue spot. Cheese and chocolate fondues were both delicious.
Excellent buffet with a wide variety. Something for everyone.
Best hair salon in town. Stylist gave me exactly what I asked for.
Relaxing spa experience. Facial was rejuvenating and the massage was excellent.
Great gym with modern equipment. Friendly staff and clean facility.
Excellent hospital. Care team was attentive and knowledgeable.
Wonderful doctor's office. Very thorough and takes time to explain everything.
Best dentist in town. Gentle and thorough. Painless cleaning.
Reliable auto repair shop. Honest pricing and quality work.
Great pool cleaning service. Weekly service is always thorough.
Excellent home cleaning service. Detail-oriented and trustworthy.
Great juice bar. Fresh pressed juices and creative smoothie combinations.
Amazing desserts. The chocolate cake was outstanding.
Best ice cream in town. Great flavors and generous portions.
Wonderful bakery. Fresh bread daily and amazing pastries.
Cozy cafe. Great coffee and perfect for reading or working.
Great tea selection. Loose leaf teas and knowledgeable staff.
Beer and wine store with an excellent selection. Great craft beer aisle.
Solid restaurant scene overall. Something for every taste.
Vibrant food scene with lots of options.
Great nightlife destination. Multiple venues and a lively atmosphere.
Wonderful arts district. Museums, galleries, and performing arts venues.
Great shopping district. Wide variety of stores.
Beauty services galore. Salons, spas, and specialty stores.
Excellent health services. Great hospitals and doctors.
Reliable home services. Cleaners, repair services, and more.
Professional services abound. Legal, accounting, and consulting.
Automotive services with fair pricing and quality work.
Great pet services. Vets, groomers, and pet stores.
Excellent financial services. Banks, credit unions, and financial advisors.
Real estate market is competitive but knowledgeable agents help.
Great education options. Public and private schools, plus colleges.
Religious organizations of all denominations.
Media outlets covering local news well.
Public services well-maintained and accessible.
Local services galore for any need.
Great local flavor and character in this area.
Active life abounds with parks, gyms, and outdoor spaces.
Event services well-established. Great venues and vendors.
Hotels and travel options are plentiful.
Great tour options for exploring the area.
Markets with fresh local produce and artisan goods.
Tobacco shops with knowledgeable staff.
Great florist. Beautiful arrangements and prompt delivery.
Photographer captured our family perfectly. Highly recommend.
Wedding planner made our day stress-free. Excellent service.
Party supplies for any occasion. Well-stocked and helpful.
Great gift shop. Unique items and thoughtful selections.
Sports clubs for all interests. Well-organized and welcoming.
Swimming pool club with clean facilities. Great for lap swimming.
Vinyl records shop with a curated selection. Knowledgeable staff.
